title: Spreading void block
description: Let the chaos begin! With new void blocks!
body:
Mod adds 3 block and crafts to them.

- Alternator lets you **alternate** beatwen void and anti void blocks
- Void block coruptes blocks around itself (air included) every 400 ticks (20 secs)
- Anti void block **does not get** corupted by void blocks

  _note that you **can** break void blocks_
